# reviewer

Reviewer Agent that audits report quality and provides revision suggestions.

## Goal

- Audit report accuracy and completeness
- Check citation validity
- Output revision suggestions or approval

## Inputs / Outputs

**Inputs**: Draft generated by Writer, research data

**Outputs**:
```python
{
    "status": "pass" | "revise",
    "feedback": [
        {"section": "Financial Analysis", "issue": "Missing year-over-year data", "suggestion": "..."}
    ]
}
```

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Audit report content
- [ ] Output revision suggestions or approval
- [ ] Intermediate results are observable
- [ ] Integration tests pass

## Review Checklist

- [ ] All data points have citations
- [ ] Citation links are valid
- [ ] Logic is coherent
- [ ] No obvious omissions

## Constraints

- Must execute before Publisher
- Review results output in structured format

## Non-goals

- Automatically fix issues (only provide suggestions)

## Links

- `src/agents/reviewer.py`
